modules.name: Cloud Concepts
modules.description: Introduction to cloud computing concepts, deployment models, service types, and how Microsoft 365 leverages the cloud for productivity and collaboration.

lessons.title: Introduction to Cloud Concepts
topics: Define cloud computing and its characteristics

lessons.title: Benefits of Cloud Computing in Microsoft 365
topics: Security and access control through Azure AD
Mapping cloud benefits to Microsoft 365 features

modules.name: Productivity and Teamwork Capabilities
modules.description: Explore Microsoft 365 productivity tools, collaboration and communication features, and business solutions including Power Platform and Microsoft Viva.

lessons.title: Overview of Microsoft 365 Productivity Tools
topics: Outlook for email, calendars, and tasks

lessons.title: Collaboration and Communication in Microsoft 365
topics: Microsoft Teams channels, chat, and meetings
OneDrive for Business sharing and co-authoring
Integration between Teams, SharePoint, and OneDrive

lessons.title: Business Solutions with Microsoft 365
topics: Power Apps for low-code app development
Viva Insights, Viva Learning, Viva Engage

modules.name: Security and Compliance
modules.description: Microsoft 365 security capabilities including Zero Trust, identity protection, and threat management, along with compliance tools for data governance and regulatory requirements.

lessons.title: Microsoft 365 Security Capabilities
topics: Identity and access management with Azure AD

modules.name: Licensing and Support
modules.description: Microsoft 365 licensing plans, plan selection for different organizations, and support services including the Service Health Dashboard and escalation processes.

lessons.title: Microsoft 365 Licensing Options
topics: Maximum user limits and plan constraints
Selecting the right plan for organizational needs

lessons.title: Microsoft 365 Support Services
topics: Service Health Dashboard for real-time monitoring
Microsoft support tiers: Standard, Professional, Unified
Incident response and communication best practices

assessment.title: Microsoft 365 Fundamentals Assessment
items: Quiz: Collaboration and Communication in Microsoft 365
Quiz: Microsoft Viva and Power Platform
Quiz: Microsoft 365 Security and Zero Trust
Quiz: Microsoft 365 Compliance and Data Governance
Quiz: Microsoft 365 Licensing and Plan Selection
Quiz: Microsoft 365 Support and Service Management
